description_long: This is a classic pedestal sink, commonly found in public restrooms, parks, or urban outdoor facilities. The sink features a wide, shallow basin with gently sloped sides and a single faucet mounted at the rear center. The pedestal base is cylindrical and supports the basin, concealing plumbing and providing stability. The surface appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, with a slightly textured finish. There is a visible drain hole at the rear of the basin, and the faucet is a simple, utilitarian design. The overall color is a uniform off-white or light gray, giving it a clean and functional appearance.
description: A pedestal sink with a wide, shallow basin and a single faucet, finished in off-white ceramic with a cylindrical base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the basin and the full height of the cylindrical pedestal.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide basin, central faucet, and the rounded front edge of the sink.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the basin's depth and the pedestal's solid support.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat back of the basin and the pedestal, with the faucet and drain area visible.
